title: Body Floor Rust Closure
objective: Close floor/rust repairs and welding scope before sealing products.
blocker_summary: 6 body material rows still need buy execution.
gate_to_close: Rust map signed off and repaired zones primed.
key_procurement_actions: Confirm price/order for primer + bedliner + metal protection stack.

title: Tub Lift + Mount-Point Mapping
objective: Map every body/chassis mount point and shim position before interface welding.
blocker_summary: Mount-condition matrix and per-point repair action list still open.
gate_to_close: Tub lifted and every body/chassis mount point mapped before welding closure.
key_procurement_actions: Tag all mount points, captive nuts, shim positions, hole condition, and required repair action before refit planning.

title: Chassis/Tub Interface Weld Closure
objective: Repair and protect all tub/chassis interface weld zones with dimensional checks.
blocker_summary: Interface closures cannot proceed until WP01A mapping signoff is complete.
gate_to_close: All mount interfaces weld-repaired, protected, and dimension-checked for refit.
key_procurement_actions: No final tub refit until all mount points pass straightness/fit and anti-corrosion prep checks.

title: Panel + Seals Refurbishment Returns
objective: Return removable panels and seals/windows in refurb-ready condition for fit-up.
blocker_summary: Vendor scope/return status tracking must be explicit per component.
gate_to_close: Doors/hood/windows/rubbers mechanically serviceable and tagged for refit.
key_procurement_actions: Only buy replacement seals/mechanisms after refurbish inspection confirms non-reusable items.

title: Tub Refit Interface + Rubber Kit Control
objective: Lock body-mount rubber and shim stack for trial fit before permanent fastening.
blocker_summary: Body mount interface hardware and shim stack are not fully locked yet.
gate_to_close: Body mount rubbers, hardware, and shims selected and trial-fitted before final torque.
key_procurement_actions: Capture exact attachment points and shim stack plan before permanent tub-to-chassis fastening.

title: Electrical Baseline Finalization
objective: Complete baseline harness termination, grounding, and fuse/relay validation.
blocker_summary: 2 electrical buy rows still open; 4 rows should be stock-verified before re-buy.
key_procurement_actions: Order selected harness/sleeving path; verify on-hand connectors/relays before duplicate buys.

title: Dashboard Switch Fit-Up + Fascia Decision Gate
objective: Allocate and mechanically fit ordered dash switches with verified clearances.
blocker_summary: Switch allocation and final fascia overflow decision are still open.
gate_to_close: All ordered Schneider switches allocated and mechanically fitted with clearance-confirmed panel mounting.
key_procurement_actions: Planned allocation: right cluster 4 controls, AC mid-cluster 2 controls; use auxiliary fascia only for any overflow/clearance conflict.

title: Diesel Cutoff + Ignition Security Integration
objective: Integrate key-off diesel cutoff and starter interrupt with fallback safety path.
blocker_summary: Ignition-security integration and validation test path not yet completed.
gate_to_close: Key OFF reliably cuts diesel solenoid and starter interrupt path is validated.
key_procurement_actions: Retain manual diesel cutoff cable as emergency backup; normal run/stop controlled by ignition logic.

title: Mechanical Service Baseline
objective: Execute reliability service pack and document defects before upgrades.
evidence_signal: engine_bay baseline evidence present; service pack rows prepared
blocker_summary: 18 mechanical safety/service rows need pricing + order.
gate_to_close: Cooling/fuel/ignition/service baseline complete with leak-free checks.
key_procurement_actions: Batch-buy must-replace consumables; keep inspect-then-replace items gated to inspection findings.

title: Low-Cost Gearshift Refinement Pass
objective: Execute low-cost shifter refinement before considering deeper gearbox scope.
blocker_summary: Shifter wear diagnosis and short-scope remediation still pending.
gate_to_close: Shifter feel improved and no disengagement under road-test load.
key_procurement_actions: Scope only: shifter bush/seat/socket service, gearbox oil, clutch hydraulic check/bleed, mount inspection/replacement as needed. No engine swap; no full gearbox rebuild unless fault persists.

title: Tub-Off Engine Access Service + Inspection
objective: Use tub-off access to inspect and service top-side engine and linkage items.
blocker_summary: Tub-off condition report and buy/no-buy decisions are not yet frozen.
gate_to_close: Engine-bay access inspection closed with condition-based replacement list.
key_procurement_actions: While tub is off: inspect mounts, hoses, lines, clamps, seals, linkage, and gearbox top-side service items.

title: Suspension Setup: Ironman Foam Cell Medium Kit
objective: Install and validate Ironman foam cell medium suspension with matched hardware refresh.
blocker_summary: Kit lock and geometry checks must close before final torque.
gate_to_close: Ironman foam cell medium suspension with greasable shackles and greasable pins installed and aligned.
key_procurement_actions: Lock Ironman medium kit procurement and avoid duplicate separate shackle/pin buys included in the kit.

title: Interior Weatherproofing Stack
evidence_signal: deferred rows indicate intentional hold until body closure
blocker_summary: Interior finish materials are deferred until floor/body sealing gate closes.
gate_to_close: Cabin sealed and dry before trim/final fit.
key_procurement_actions: Do not buy full interior finish stack early; release purchases by phase gate.

title: Reassembly + Validation
objective: Controlled re-fit and end-to-end validation with punch-list closure.
evidence_signal: Prerequisite work packages not yet gate-closed
blocker_summary: Needs closure of body, electrical, and mechanical baseline packages.
gate_to_close: Roadworthy baseline validation passed with residual defects logged.
key_procurement_actions: Only release optional upgrades after baseline validation sign-off. Tub refit control and suspension setup must close first.

title: Donor Vitz EPS Integration
objective: Integrate donor Vitz EPS with verified mount geometry shaft alignment and assist control wiring.
evidence_signal: EPS donor path approved by owner and workshop
blocker_summary: Mechanical adapter and wiring strategy still needs scope freeze and parts confirmation.
gate_to_close: EPS assists smoothly through full steering range with no binding or collision under load.
key_procurement_actions: Release EPS-specific procurement only after fitment geometry and electrical control path are frozen.

title: Suspension Upgrade Execution
objective: Upgrade suspension components from measured baseline and validate ride/clearance/alignment under load.
evidence_signal: Upgrade direction set to Ironman foam cell medium kit with matching hardware
blocker_summary: Ironman medium kit is selected; full procurement lock and fitment scheduling are pending baseline inspection outcomes.
gate_to_close: Suspension upgrade completes with safe handling and no unresolved chassis or brake conflicts.
key_procurement_actions: Order the Ironman medium kit as one locked set and only add non-included bushes/hardware after measurement confirmation.
